description: PR09 approval-gate E2E fixture: Planning Muse uses read-only tools across a fake-provider tool loop, then returns a structured plan with a deterministic id.

{"id":"pr09-approval-gate-plan","title":"Add CLI version command","objective":"Add a /version command to the CLI that displays the app version from mix.exs.","summary":"Use read-only inspection results to plan a small command-dispatcher update and tests.","tasks":[{"title":"Inspect existing command routing","description":"Review the command dispatcher and command parser paths to identify where /version should be routed.","target_files":["lib/command_dispatcher.ex","mix.exs"],"requires_write":false,"requires_shell":false},{"title":"Add version command handling","description":"Add parser and dispatcher support for /version, reading the application version from mix metadata.","target_files":["lib/command_dispatcher.ex"],"requires_write":true,"requires_shell":false},{"title":"Cover the command with tests","description":"Add CLI command tests proving /version returns the configured version string.","target_files":["test/my_app_test.exs"],"requires_write":true,"requires_shell":false}],"risks":["Keep implementation gated until the plan is explicitly approved."],"validation":["Run the targeted command dispatcher tests after implementation."],"inspected_files":["mix.exs","lib/command_dispatcher.ex"],"likely_changed_files":["lib/command_dispatcher.ex","test/my_app_test.exs"],"metadata":{"fixture":"pr09_approval_gate_flow_batches"}}
